steps: Add 3 g, ±0.03 of monopotassium phosphate (KH 2 PO 4 ) in a 1L clean bottle.
Add 7.52 g, ±0.05 of disodium phosphate dihydrate (Na 2 HPO 4 .2H 2 O).
Add 1 mL of magnesium sulfate solution. Our protocol for making this solution can be found here: Preparation of 1M magnesium sulfate solution (MgSO4) by APE Lab
creator: Alfonso Pérez Escudero
